description: Bob's Discount Furniture, Inc. engages in retailing home furnishings in the United States. It provides products in several categories including living rooms, bedrooms, mattresses, dining rooms, occasional tables, lamps, outdoors, and accessories. The company sells its products through Internet. The company was formerly known as BDF Holding Corp. and changed its name to Bob's Discount Furniture, Inc. in October 2025. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Manchester, Connecticut.
